headline: Atos Supported the European Space Agency in Selecting Twelve Service Providers through an Open Competition to deliver Advanced Applications & Services on the DestinE Platform
summary: e Press Release Atos Supported the European Space Agency in Selecting Twelve Service Providers through an Open Competition to deliver Advanced Applications & Services on the DestinE Platform These applications and services serve as gateways to a comprehensive understanding of Earth's processes, enabling informed decision-making towards a more sustainable future. Some of these applications and services are now operational. Paris, France – April 16, 2026 – Atos, a global leader of AI-powered digit
